help.title: Settings
help.intro: Operator-level configuration for this deployment — server URL, JWT secret status, global request headers, and SMTP.
help.envDrivenHosted: These values are configured by the platform operator through environment variables and can't be changed from this page.
help.envDrivenSelfHosted: These values are read from your deployment's environment variables. Edit your .env / deployment config and restart to change them.

security.title: Security
security.jwtSecretDefault: JWT secret is using the insecure default value — set JWT_SECRET before going to production.

smtp.title: E-mail (SMTP)
smtp.notConfigured: SMTP is not configured — password reset emails are logged instead of sent.
